summary: Bug fix verified: Task Manager employee multi-select dropdown now closes when clicking outside the component. All 5 requested test cases passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: The fix uses useRef and useEffect with mousedown event listener - a correct React pattern for detecting clicks outside
Event listener is properly cleaned up in useEffect return function
Event listener is only added when isOpen is true - efficient implementation
data-testid attributes present for all key elements (multi-select-employees, employee-dropdown, employee-option-{id})
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee multi-select dropdown in Task Management page working correctly. Dropdown closes on outside click (bug fixed), checkboxes update visual state, badges display for selected employees, X button removes employees, and dropdown reopens on click.

dropdown_closes_on_outside_click.details: Clicking on Task Title input (outside dropdown) closes the employee dropdown correctly

employee_selection_checkbox_visual_state.details: Selecting an employee shows checkmark inside checkbox with blue background (bg-primary), deselecting removes checkmark

selected_employees_display_as_badges.details: Selected employees (Rahul Sharma, Priya Patel) displayed as badges with user icon and X button inside the multi-select input

remove_employee_via_x_button.details: Clicking X button on badge removes employee from selection, dropdown stays closed, badge disappears

dropdown_reopens_on_click.details: Clicking on multi-select input reopens the dropdown showing all employees with their selection states

bug_fix_verification.issue: Employee multi-select dropdown remained open after selecting employees
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added useRef (containerRef) and useEffect with mousedown event listener to detect clicks outside containerRef.current
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Dropdown now closes when clicking outside the component
